use thiserror::Error;

#[derive(Error, Debug)]
pub enum AuthError {
    #[error("authentication failed: token format was invalid")]
    InvalidToken { token: String },

    #[error("invalid credentials provided")]
    InvalidCredentials { password: String },

    #[error("session expired")]
    SessionExpired { session_secret: String },

    #[error("API key rejected")]
    ApiKeyRejected { api_key: String },

    #[error("cookie validation failed")]
    InvalidCookie { cookie_value: String },

    #[error("credential mismatch")]
    CredentialMismatch { auth_token: String },
}

#[derive(Error, Debug)]
pub enum ConfigError {
    #[error("missing required field: {field}")]
    MissingField { field: String },

    #[error("invalid value for {field}: expected {expected}")]
    InvalidValue {
        field: String,
        expected: String,
    },
}
